message: helper memory argument can exceed the destination map-value buffer
required_proof: prove bpf_probe_read_user writes no more bytes than fit in ssl_event.buf

related_spans.label: maximum helper copy is larger than the destination field
copy length is bounded by MAX_BUF_SIZE, not by ssl_event.buf

evidence.detail: invalid helper memory range for bpf_probe_read_user
R1 points into ssl_data map value but R2 may exceed the remaining bytes in the buf field

help: Make the scratch event buffer at least as large as MAX_BUF_SIZE, or cap copy_size by sizeof(data->buf) before calling bpf_probe_read_user().
